cubes.name: Classic 3x3 Cube
cubes.description: The standard 3x3 Rubik's Cube, perfect for beginners and speedcubers alike.

cubes.name: Mirror Cube
cubes.description: A shape-modifying puzzle where pieces differ in size instead of color.

cubes.name: Pyraminx
cubes.description: A tetrahedron-shaped twisty puzzle that's easy to learn and fun to solve.

cubes.name: Megaminx
cubes.description: A twelve-sided puzzle offering a greater challenge than the classic cube.

cubes.name: 4x4 Revenge Cube
cubes.description: An advanced cube with no fixed centers, introducing parity cases.

cubes.name: 5x5 Professor Cube
cubes.description: A larger cube puzzle requiring advanced reduction techniques.

cubes.name: Skewb
cubes.description: A corner-turning cube puzzle with smooth rotations and unique solving methods.

cubes.name: Ghost Cube
cubes.description: A highly challenging shape-mod puzzle that appears scrambled even when solved.

cubes.name: 2x2 Pocket Cube
cubes.description: A compact version of the Rubik's Cube that's ideal for quick solves.

cubes.name: Axis Cube
cubes.description: A shape-shifting cube that changes form with every turn while maintaining color patterns.
